academic_achievements.publications_summary: 发表SCI/EI检索学术论文20余项
representative_publications: Wang Xiubo, Duan Guangren. Predictive control for Euler–Lagrange systems with input saturation and dead-Zone: A FAS approach [J]. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2025.

Wang Xiubo, Duan Guangren. Fully actuated system approaches: Predictive elimination control for discrete-time nonlinear time-varying systems with full state constraints and time-varying delays[J]. IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I: Regular Papers, 2024, 71(1): 383-396.

Wang Xiubo, Duan Guangren. Comprehensive reconstructions and predictive control for quadrotor UAV information gathering tracking missions based on fully actuated system approaches[J]. ISA Transactions, 2024, 147: 540-553.

Wang Xiubo, Duan Guangren. High-order fully actuated system approaches: Model predictive control with applications to under-actuated systems[J]. Journal of the Franklin Institute, 2023, 360(10): 6953-6975.
Wang Xiubo, Duan Guangren. 带有输入饱和的非线性全驱系统级联预测控制[J]. 控制理论与应用. 2025.

graduate_student_supervision.recruitment_details: 每年招收1-2名硕士研究生
graduate_student_supervision.research_areas: 研究方向涵盖控制理论、航空航天与机器人等领域
graduate_student_supervision.support_and_recommendations: 支持研究生参加国内外学术会议，推荐优秀研究生到国内外知名高校或科研机构读博
